---
title: "asd_alignment"
author: "Author"
date: "2025-08-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
pacman::p_load(
  here,
  papaja,
  gghalves,
  tidyverse,
  ggplot2,
  fUnitRoots,
  bruceR,
  lmerTest,
  lme4,
  broom,
  patchwork,
  brms,
  BayesFactor,
  showtext,
  ggsci,
  ggalluvial,
  writexl,
  mclogit,
  ggbeeswarm,
  PsychWordVec
)
options(scipen = 9999, digits = 5)
```


```{r 评分}
files = fs::dir_ls("./new_Rating")
Rating.df <- purrr::map_dfr(files, readxl::read_xlsx) 

Rating.df.mean <- Rating.df |>
  dplyr::filter(Rating != "无产出" & Rating != "未产出") |>
  dplyr::mutate(Rating = as.numeric(Rating)) |>
  dplyr::filter(Rating >= 1 & Rating < 10)|>
  group_by(Rate_ID) |>
  summarise(Rating.mean = mean(Rating)) |>
  ungroup()|>
  as.data.frame()

#评分
asd_filtered <- Rating.df.mean |> filter(grepl("ASD", Rate_ID, ignore.case = TRUE))
asd_zh <- asd_filtered[grepl("zh$", asd_filtered$Rate_ID), ]
asd_ba <- asd_filtered[grepl("ba$", asd_filtered$Rate_ID), ]
asd_be <- asd_filtered[grepl("be$", asd_filtered$Rate_ID), ]
tdc_filtered <- Rating.df.mean |> filter(grepl("TDC", Rate_ID, ignore.case = TRUE))
tdc_zh <- tdc_filtered[grepl("zh$", tdc_filtered$Rate_ID), ]
tdc_ba <- tdc_filtered[grepl("ba$", tdc_filtered$Rate_ID), ]
tdc_be <- tdc_filtered[grepl("be$", tdc_filtered$Rate_ID), ]
pingfen <- rbind(asd_zh, asd_ba, asd_be, tdc_zh, tdc_ba, tdc_be)
```


```{r import data}
ASD <- rio::import("./data/ASD.xlsx")
TDC <- rio::import("./data/TDC.xlsx")
b1 <- rio::import("./data/Result1002.xlsx", which = "Block1")
b2 <- rio::import("./data/Result1002.xlsx", which = "Block2")
b3 <- rio::import("./data/Result1002.xlsx", which = "Block3")
basic <- rio::import("./data/Result1002.xlsx", which = "basic") %>% 
  filter(Child_name %in% c(ASD$Child_name, TDC$Child_name)) %>%
  mutate(AGE = scale(Age)[, 1],
         PPVTZ = scale(PPVT)[, 1])
df <- bind_rows(b1, b2, b3)

quxiang <- c("举起", "穿上", "摘下", "放下", "扔掉", "挂起") 
jieguo <- c("关掉", "吃掉", "喝掉", "打破", "打碎", 
            "拔掉", "摔坏", "洗净", "踩坏", "撕掉")

df01 <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sen_ACC == 1, Syntax_production %in% c("ba", "zh", "be")) %>%
  merge(basic, by = "Child_name") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = Group.x) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Group.x, -Group.y, -contains(".x"), -contains(".y"), -Task_Data, -Birth_data) %>%
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Sex, Age, Group, everything()) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Words_prime %in% c(quxiang, jieguo)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(词类 = ifelse(Words_prime %in% quxiang, "趋向动补", "结果动补"),
                词类 = factor(词类, levels = c("趋向动补", "结果动补"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_production = factor(Syntax_production, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")),
                Trials = factor(Trials),
                Child_name = factor(Child_name),
                Group = factor(Group, levels = c("TDC", "ASD")),
                Syntax_prime = factor(Syntax_prime, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")))
df01 <- merge(df01, pingfen, by = "Rate_ID")
```

```{r 评分数据整理}
jgpingfen <- df01 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Rating.mean, 
  词类, Trials, PPVTZ) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 == "结果动补")
qxpingfen <- df01 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Rating.mean, 
  词类, Trials, PPVTZ) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 != "结果动补", 
                #Syntax_prime == "be", 
                #Syntax_production == "be"
                )
pf_df <- rbind(jgpingfen, qxpingfen) 



# pf.df <- rbind(jgpingfen, qxpingfen) |> group_by(Child_name, Group, Syntax_production, Syntax_prime, 词类)|>
#   summarise(mean = mean(Rating.mean))
# fc <- bruceR::MANOVA(data = qxdf, dv = "mean", between = "Group", within = c("词类"), subID = "Child_name")
```

```{r 评分数据贝叶斯}
model_formulas <- list(
  pf1 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  pf2 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Trials),
  pf3 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name),
  pf4 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类 + PPVTZ,
  pf5 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类 + (1| Trials) +(1| Child_name),
  pf6 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类 + (1| Trials),
  pf7 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类+ (1| Child_name),
  pf8 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group * 词类,
  pf9 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group + 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  pf10 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group + 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name),
  pf11 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group + 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Trials), #最优模型
  pf12 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group + 词类 + PPVTZ,
  pf13 = Rating.mean ~ 1  + Group + 词类,
  pf14 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + Group,
  pf15 = Rating.mean ~ 1 + 词类) 

pf_objects <- list()
pf_summaries <- list ()
for (model_name in names(model_formulas)) {
  formula <- model_formulas[[model_name]]
  model <- brm(
    formula = formula,
    data = pf_df ,
    init = 0,
    chains = 4,
    warmup = 1000,
    iter = 5000,
    thin = 1,
    cores = 4)

  pf_objects[[model_name]] <- model
  pf_summaries[[model_name]] <- summary(model)
}
loo_qx <- list()
for (model_name in names(pf_objects)) {
  loo_qx[[model_name]] <- LOO(pf_objects[[model_name]])
}
pf.compare <- brms::LOO(
  pf_objects$pf1,
  pf_objects$pf2,
  pf_objects$pf3,
  pf_objects$pf4,
  pf_objects$pf5,
  pf_objects$pf6,
  pf_objects$pf7,
  pf_objects$pf8,
  pf_objects$pf9,
  pf_objects$pf10,
  pf_objects$pf11,
  pf_objects$pf12,
  pf_objects$pf13,
  pf_objects$pf14,
  pf_objects$pf15
)
bayestestR::hdi(pf_objects$pf9)

pf1.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf1)
pf2.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf2)
pf3.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf3)
pf4.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf4)
pf5.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf5)
pf6.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf6)
pf7.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf7)
pf8.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf8)
pf9.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf9)
pf10.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf10)
pf11.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf11)
pf12.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf12)
pf13.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf13)
pf14.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf14)
pf15.mae <- posterior_predict(pf_objects$pf15)

pf1 <- median(abs(apply(pf1.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf2 <- median(abs(apply(pf2.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf3 <- median(abs(apply(pf3.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf4 <- median(abs(apply(pf4.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf5 <- median(abs(apply(pf5.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf6 <- median(abs(apply(pf6.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf7 <- median(abs(apply(pf7.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf8 <- median(abs(apply(pf8.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf9 <- median(abs(apply(pf9.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf10 <- median(abs(apply(pf10.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf11 <- median(abs(apply(pf11.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf12 <- median(abs(apply(pf12.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf13 <- median(abs(apply(pf13.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf14 <- median(abs(apply(pf14.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
pf15 <- median(abs(apply(pf15.mae, 2, mean) - pf_df[, 5]))
```


```{r 评分fig4}
pf_new <- df01 %>% 
  dplyr::select(Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Rating.mean, 词类, Group, Words_prime) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Words_prime, 词类, Group) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    pingfen = mean(Rating.mean, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")|>
  arrange(词类, pingfen)|>
  dplyr::mutate(Words_prime = factor(Words_prime, levels = unique(Words_prime))) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = pingfen)
table(pf_new$词类)
n_quxiang <- sum(pf_new$词类 == "趋向动补")
fig4 <- ggplot(pf_new) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = n_quxiang + 0.5, xmax = Inf,
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = -Inf, xmax = n_quxiang + 0.5,
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf, fill = "white", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = Words_prime, xend = Words_prime, y = ASD, yend = TDC),
               size = 1.5, color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(aes(x = Words_prime, y = ASD), 
             size = 4, color = "#B3742D", fill = "#B3742D", shape = 21) +
  geom_point(aes(x = Words_prime, y = TDC), 
             size = 4, color = "#006654", fill = "#006654", shape = 21) +
  annotate("point", x = 8, y = 10.2, size = 4, 
           color = "#B3742D", fill = "#B3742D", shape = 21) +
  annotate("text", x = 8, y = 10.3, label = "孤独症儿童", 
           size = 3.5, hjust = 0) +
  annotate("point", x = 7, y = 10.2, size = 4, 
           color = "#006654", fill = "#006654", shape = 21) +
  annotate("text", x = 7, y = 10.3, label = "典型儿童", 
           size = 3.5, hjust = 0) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 8.75, xmax = 9.25, ymin = 10.14, ymax = 10.26, 
           fill = "grey90", color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  annotate("text", x = 9, y = 10.3, label = "结果动补", 
           size = 3.5, hjust = 0) +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 5.75, xmax = 6.25, ymin = 10.14, ymax = 10.26, 
           fill = "white", color = "grey60", size = 0.3) +
  annotate("text", x = 6, y = 10.3, label = "趋向动补", 
           size = 3.5, hjust = 0) +
  theme_test() +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL) +
  coord_flip(ylim = c(5, 11)) + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "#e5e5e5"))
fig4
ggsave("./figure/fig4.svg", plot = fig4, width = 7, height = 5)
ggsave("./figure/fig4.png", plot = fig4, width = 7, height = 5)
```



```{r 趋向动补模型建立和比较}
dfqx <- df01 |> 
  dplyr::filter(词类 == "趋向动补") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_production = factor(Syntax_production, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")),
                Trials = factor(Trials),
                Child_name = factor(Child_name),
                Group = factor(Group, levels = c("TDC", "ASD")),
                Syntax_align = ifelse(Syntax_production == "be", 1, 0),
                Syntax_prime = factor(Syntax_prime, levels = c("be", "ba", "zh")))

qx1.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime + Group + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfqx,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
qx2.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime * Group + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfqx,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
qx3.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime + Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfqx,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
qx4.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime * Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfqx,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

looqx1 <- LOO(qx1.bayes)
looqx2 <- LOO(qx2.bayes)
looqx3 <- LOO(qx3.bayes)
looqx4 <- LOO(qx4.bayes)
brms::loo_compare(looqx1, looqx2, looqx3, looqx4)

qx1.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(qx1.bayes)
qx2.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(qx2.bayes)
qx3.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(qx3.bayes)
qx4.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(qx4.bayes)
qx1.mae <- median(abs(apply(qx1.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfqx[, 28]))
qx2.mae <- median(abs(apply(qx2.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfqx[, 28]))
qx3.mae <- median(abs(apply(qx3.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfqx[, 28]))
qx4.mae <- median(abs(apply(qx4.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfqx[, 28]))
```




```{r 趋向动补贝叶斯模型拟合} 
qx3_trace <- bayesplot::mcmc_trace(qx3.bayes,
                                   pars = c("b_Syntax_primeba",
                                            "b_Syntax_primezh",
                                            "b_GroupASD",
                                            "b_PPVTZ")) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "pt"),
        legend.key.size = unit(1, "lines"),
        legend.key.height = unit(1, "lines")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 0.5)))
qx3_trace
#ggsave(plot = trace_noeff, "./figure/trace_noeff.svg", width = 6, height = 4)

qx3.ppcheck <- pp_check(qx3.bayes, ndraws = 100)
qx3.ppcheck 
qx3.b <- mcmc_plot(qx3.bayes, 
                   variable = c("b_Syntax_primeba",
                                "b_Syntax_primezh",
                                "b_GroupASD",
                                "b_PPVTZ"),
                   type = "areas", prob = 0.95)
qx3.b
qx3.pos <- posterior_predict(qx3.bayes)
qx3.hdi <- bayestestR::hdi(qx3.bayes)
dfqx$predict = predict(qx3.bayes, type = "response")[, 1]
```


```{r 结果动补模型建立建立}
dfjg <- df01 |> 
  dplyr::filter(词类 != "趋向动补") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_production = factor(Syntax_production, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")),
                Trials = factor(Trials),
                Child_name = factor(Child_name),
                Group = factor(Group, levels = c("TDC", "ASD")),
                Syntax_align = ifelse(Syntax_production == "zh", 1, 0),
                Syntax_prime = factor(Syntax_prime, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")))

jg1.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime + Group + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfjg,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
jg2.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime * Group + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfjg,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
jg3.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime + Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfjg,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
jg4.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_align ~ Syntax_prime * Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = dfjg,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

loojg1 <- LOO(jg1.bayes)
loojg2 <- LOO(jg2.bayes)
loojg3 <- LOO(jg3.bayes)
loojg4 <- LOO(jg4.bayes)
brms::loo_compare(loojg1, loojg2, loojg3, loojg4)

jg1.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(jg1.bayes)
jg2.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(jg2.bayes)
jg3.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(jg3.bayes)
jg4.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(jg4.bayes)
jg1.mae <- median(abs(apply(jg1.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfjg[, 28]))
jg2.mae <- median(abs(apply(jg2.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfjg[, 28]))
jg3.mae <- median(abs(apply(jg3.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfjg[, 28]))
jg4.mae <- median(abs(apply(jg4.pp.mae, 2, mean) - dfjg[, 28]))
```


```{r 结果动补贝叶斯模型拟合}
jg3_trace <- bayesplot::mcmc_trace(jg3.bayes,
                                   pars = c("b_Syntax_primeba",
                                            "b_Syntax_primebe",
                                            "b_GroupASD",
                                            "b_PPVTZ")) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "pt"),
        legend.key.size = unit(1, "lines"),
        legend.key.height = unit(1, "lines")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 0.5)))
jg3_trace
#ggsave(plot = trace_noeff, "./figure/trace_noeff.svg", width = 6, height = 4)

jg3.ppcheck <- pp_check(jg3.bayes, ndraws = 100)
jg3.ppcheck 
jg3.b <- mcmc_plot(jg3.bayes, 
                   variable = c("b_Syntax_primeba",
                                "b_Syntax_primebe",
                                "b_GroupASD",
                                "b_PPVTZ"),
                   type = "areas", prob = 0.95)
jg3.b
jg3.pos <- posterior_predict(jg3.bayes)
jg3.hdi <- bayestestR::hdi(jg3.bayes)
dfjg$predict = predict(jg3.bayes, type = "response")[, 1]
```


```{r 趋向动补协同和结果动补差异贝叶斯}
dfqx1 <- dfqx |>
  group_by(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, 词类) |>
  summarise(可能性 = mean(predict)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::filter(Syntax_prime == "be") |>
  rename(组别 = Group, 句法结构 = "Syntax_prime")
dfjg1 <- dfjg |>
  group_by(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, 词类) |>
  summarise(可能性 = mean(predict)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::filter(Syntax_prime == "zh") |>
  rename(组别 = Group, 句法结构 = "Syntax_prime")
df_hb <- rbind(dfqx1, dfjg1) |> rbind(c("CHENGCHENG", "ASD", "be", "趋向动补", 0.001))|>
  dplyr::mutate(可能性 = as.numeric(可能性))

chayi1.bayes <- brm(
  可能性 ~ 词类 + 组别 + (1| Child_name),
  data = df_hb,
  init = 0,
  family = Beta(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
chayi2.bayes <- brm(
  可能性 ~ 词类 * 组别 + (1| Child_name),
  data = df_hb,
  init = 0,
  family = Beta(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
chayi3.bayes <- brm(
  可能性 ~ 词类 + 组别,
  data = df_hb,
  init = 0,
  family = Beta(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)
chayi4.bayes <- brm(
  可能性 ~ 词类 * 组别 + (1| Child_name),
  data = df_hb,
  init = 0,
  family = Beta(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

loochayi1 <- LOO(chayi1.bayes)
loochayi2 <- LOO(chayi2.bayes)
loochayi3 <- LOO(chayi3.bayes)
loochayi4 <- LOO(chayi4.bayes)
brms::loo_compare(loochayi1, loochayi2, loochayi3, loochayi4)

chayi1.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(chayi1.bayes)
chayi2.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(chayi2.bayes)
chayi3.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(chayi3.bayes)
chayi4.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(chayi4.bayes)
chayi1.mae <- median(abs(apply(chayi1.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df_hb[, 5]))
chayi2.mae <- median(abs(apply(chayi2.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df_hb[, 5]))
chayi3.mae <- median(abs(apply(chayi3.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df_hb[, 5]))
chayi4.mae <- median(abs(apply(chayi4.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df_hb[, 5]))

chayi3_trace <- bayesplot::mcmc_trace(chayi3.bayes,
                                      pars = c("b_词类结果动补",
                                               "b_组别ASD")) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "pt"),
        legend.key.size = unit(1, "lines"),
        legend.key.height = unit(1, "lines")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 0.5)))
jg3_trace
#ggsave(plot = trace_noeff, "./figure/trace_noeff.svg", width = 6, height = 4)

chayi3.ppcheck <- pp_check(chayi3.bayes, ndraws = 100)
chayi3.ppcheck 
chayi3.b <- mcmc_plot(chayi3.bayes, 
                      variable = c("b_词类结果动补",
                                   "b_组别ASD"),
                      type = "areas", prob = 0.95)
chayi3.b
chayi3.pos <- posterior_predict(chayi3.bayes)
chayi3.hdi <- bayestestR::hdi(chayi3.bayes)
df_hb$predict = predict(chayi3.bayes, type = "response")[, 1]
```


```{r 趋向动补协同和结果动补差异图}
fighb <- ggplot(df_hb, aes(x = 词类, y = as.numeric(可能性)))+
  geom_half_violin(data = ~ subset(.x, 词类 == "趋向动补"),
                   aes(color = 词类), size = 1, side = "l", alpha = 0.8)+
  geom_half_violin(data = ~ subset(.x, 词类 == "结果动补"),
                   aes(color = 词类), size = 1, side = "r", alpha = 0.8)+
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = 词类), width = 0.3, size = 1)+
  geom_line(aes(group = Child_name), color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.85)+
  geom_jitter(aes(color = 词类, fill = 词类), alpha = 0.9, size = 4, pch = 21, width = 0.02)+ 
  labs(y = "句法协同强度", x = NULL)+
  facet_wrap(~ 组别, nrow = 1, labeller = labeller(组别 = c("TDC" = "典型儿童",  "ASD" = "孤独症儿童"))) +
  theme_test()+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#B3742D", "#006654"))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#B3742D", "#006654"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        legend.position = "none", 
        panel.grid.major = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "#e5e5e5"))
fighb
ggsave("./figure/fighb.svg", plot = fighb, width = 6, height = 3.5)
ggsave("./figure/fighb.png", plot = fighb, width = 6, height = 3.5)
```

结果动补的句法协同更强（结果动补适合被和把），即在主动句的启动下更多的产出了主动句，
说明主动句句法结构比较简单，而被动句和把字句句法较难。

```{r 趋向产生什么数据准备}
df02 <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sen_ACC == 1) %>%
  merge(basic, by = "Child_name") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = Group.x) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Group.x, -Group.y, -contains(".x"), -contains(".y"), -Task_Data, -Birth_data) %>%
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Sex, Age, Group, everything()) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(词类 = ifelse(Words_prime %in% quxiang, "趋向动补", "结果动补"),
                词类 = factor(词类, levels = c("趋向动补", "结果动补")),
                Syntax_production = ifelse(is.na(Syntax_production), "错误", as.character(Syntax_production)),
                Group = factor(Group, levels = c("TDC", "ASD")),
                Syntax_prime = factor(Syntax_prime, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")))
df02 <- merge(df02, pingfen, by = "Rate_ID")
```

```{r 趋向动补贝叶斯}
dfqx2 <- df02 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, PPVTZ, 词类, Trials) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 == "趋向动补", Syntax_prime == "be", Syntax_production != "错误") |>
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_production = factor(Syntax_production, levels = c("be", "ba", "zh")))
#qx.prior <- c(set_prior("normal(0, 5)", class = "b", coef = "GroupASD", dpar = "muba"))

model_formulas <- list(
  mul.qx1 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  mul.qx2 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ + (1| Trials),
  mul.qx3 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name),
  mul.qx4 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ,
  mul.qx5 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + (1| Trials) +(1| Child_name),
  mul.qx6 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + (1| Trials),
  mul.qx7 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + (1| Child_name),
  mul.qx8 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group,
  mul.qx9 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  mul.qx10 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name),
  mul.qx11 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ + (1| Trials),#最优模型
  mul.qx12 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ,
  mul.qx13 = Syntax_production ~ 1) 

quxiang_objects <- list()
quxiang_summaries <- list ()
for (model_name in names(model_formulas)) {
  formula <- model_formulas[[model_name]]
  model <- brm(
    formula = formula,
    data = dfqx2 ,
    init = 0,
    family = categorical(link = "logit"),
    chains = 4,
    warmup = 1000,
    iter = 5000,
    thin = 1,
    cores = 4)

  quxiang_objects[[model_name]] <- model
  quxiang_summaries[[model_name]] <- summary(model)
}
loo_qx <- list()
for (model_name in names(quxiang_objects)) {
  loo_qx[[model_name]] <- LOO(quxiang_objects[[model_name]])
}
qx.compare <- brms::LOO(
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx1,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx2,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx3,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx4,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx5,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx6,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx7,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx8,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx9,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx10,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx11,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx12,
  quxiang_objects$mul.qx13
)
bayestestR::hdi(quxiang_objects$mul.qx13)
```


```{r 结果动补贝叶斯}
dfjg2 <- df02 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, PPVTZ, 词类, Trials) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 != "趋向动补", Syntax_prime == "zh", Syntax_production != "错误") |>
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_production = factor(Syntax_production, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")))

model_formulas <- list(
  mul.jg1 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  mul.jg2 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ +(1| Trials),
  mul.jg3 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ +(1| Child_name),
  mul.jg4 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  mul.jg5 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group +(1| Trials),
  mul.jg6 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group +(1| Child_name),
  mul.jg7 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group + PPVTZ,
  mul.jg8 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + Group,
  mul.jg9 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials), #最优模型
  mul.jg10 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name),
  mul.jg11 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ + (1| Trials),
  mul.jg12 = Syntax_production ~ 1 + PPVTZ ,
  mul.jg13 = Syntax_production ~ 1)

jieguo_objects <- list()
jieguo_summaries <- list ()

for (model_name in names(model_formulas)) {
  formula <- model_formulas[[model_name]]
  model <- brm(
    formula = formula,
    data = dfjg2 ,
    init = 0,
    family = categorical(link = "logit"),
    chains = 4,
    warmup = 1000,
    iter = 5000,
    thin = 1,
    cores = 4)

  jieguo_objects[[model_name]] <- model
  jieguo_summaries[[model_name]] <- summary(model)
}

loo_jg <- list()
for (model_name in names(jieguo_objects)) {
  loo_jg[[model_name]] <- LOO(jieguo_objects[[model_name]])
}

jg.compare <- brms::LOO(
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg1,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg2,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg3,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg4,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg5,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg6,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg7,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg8,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg9,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg10,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg11,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg12,
  jieguo_objects$mul.jg13
)
bayestestR::hdi(jieguo_objects$mul.jg9)
```

```{r 桑基图数据整理}
dfqx3 <- df02 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Syntax_ACC, 词类) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 == "趋向动补", Syntax_prime == "be") |>
  count(Syntax_production, Group) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_prime = rep("be", 6)) |>
  rename(freq = n)

dfjg3 <- df02 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Syntax_ACC, 词类) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 != "趋向动补", Syntax_prime == "zh") |>
  count(Syntax_production, Group) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Syntax_prime = rep("be", 4)) |>
  rename(freq = n)
```

```{r 趋向动补桑基图}
dfqx3_pct <- dfqx3 %>%
  mutate(total_all = sum(freq))
right_labels <- data.frame(
  Syntax_production = c("be", "zh", "ba"),
  freq = c(16, 18, 30),
  label = c("被字句\n25.00%", "主动句\n28.12%", "把字句\n46.88%"),
  x = 1.86,
  y = c(8.4, 16 + 9.4, 34 + 15)  # 条带中心：16/2=8, 16+18/2=25, 34+30/2=49
)

left_labels <- data.frame(
  Group = c("TDC", "ASD"),
  y = c(17, 15),
  x = 1,
  label = c("典型儿童\n34(试次)", "孤独症儿童\n30(试次)")
)

left_labels <- data.frame(
  Group = c("典型儿童", "孤独症儿童"),
  total = c(34, 30),
  x = 1,
  y = c(34/2 + 30, 30/2)  # TDC在上，ASD在下，调整到中心
) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Group, "\n", total))

fig1 <- ggplot(dfqx3_pct, 
               aes(axis1 = Group, 
                   axis2 = Syntax_production, 
                   y = freq)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = Syntax_production), 
                width = 1/8, 
                alpha = 0.7,
                curve_type = "sigmoid") +
  geom_stratum(width = 1/4, 
               fill = "transparent", 
               color = "grey30", 
               size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = left_labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 5) +
  geom_text(data = right_labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 5,
            hjust = 0,
            nudge_x = 0.08) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("被动句产出", "儿童协同"), 
                   expand = c(0.15, 0.1),
                   position = "top") +  # 轴标签移到顶部
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("zh" = "#B3742D", 
                               "ba" = "#006654", 
                               "be" = "#7570B3"),
                    name = "产出句法",
                    labels = c("主动句", "把字句", "被字句")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
  legend.position = c(0.5, 1.05),  # x=0.5居中, y=1.05在图上方
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
  legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, vjust = 2.5),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  plot.margin = margin(t = 10, b = 0, l = 0, r = 0))
fig1
```

```{r 结果动补桑基图}
dfjg3_pct <- dfjg3 %>%
  mutate(total_all = sum(freq))
right_labels <- data.frame(
  Syntax_production = c("ba", "zh"),
  freq = c(34, 42),
  label = c("把动句\n32.08%", "主动句\n67.92%"),
  x = 1.86,
  y = c(89, 36)  # 条带中心：16/2=8, 16+18/2=25, 34+30/2=49
)

left_labels <- data.frame(
  Group = c("TDC", "ASD"),
  y = c(25.5, 87),
  x = 1,
  label = c("典型儿童\n34(试次)", "孤独症儿童\n30(试次)")
)

left_labels <- data.frame(
  Group = c("典型儿童", "孤独症儿童"),
  total = c(51, 55),
  x = 1,
  y = c(51/2 + 55, 55/2)  # TDC在上，ASD在下，调整到中心
) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Group, "\n", total))

fig2 <- ggplot(dfjg3_pct, 
               aes(axis1 = Group, 
                   axis2 = Syntax_production, 
                   y = freq)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = Syntax_production), 
                width = 1/8, 
                alpha = 0.7,
                curve_type = "sigmoid") +
  geom_stratum(width = 1/4, 
               fill = "transparent", 
               color = "grey30", 
               size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = left_labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 5) +
  geom_text(data = right_labels,
            aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 5,
            hjust = 0,
            nudge_x = 0.08) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("主动句产出", "儿童协同"), 
                   expand = c(0.15, 0.1),
                   position = "top") +  # 轴标签移到顶部
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("zh" = "#B3742D",
                               "ba" =  "#006654"),
                    name = "产出句法",
                    labels = c("主动句", "把字句")) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
  legend.position = c(0.5, 1.05),  # x=0.5居中, y=1.05在图上方
  legend.direction = "horizontal",
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
  legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm"),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, vjust = 2.5),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  plot.margin = margin(t = 10, b = 0, l = 0, r = 0)
)
fig2
```

```{r 结果动补+趋向动补}
fig3 <- fig1+fig2
ggsave("./figure/fig3.svg", plot = fig3, width = 12.5, height = 4)
ggsave("./figure/fig3.png", plot = fig3, width = 12.5, height = 4)
```


###############################################################################################

```{r 不协同时组别和产出有什么关联频次检验}
df02 <- df %>%
  dplyr::filter(Sen_ACC == 1) %>%
  merge(basic, by = "Child_name") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = Group.x) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Group.x, -Group.y, -contains(".x"), -contains(".y"), -Task_Data, -Birth_data) %>%
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Sex, Age, Group, everything()) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(词类 = ifelse(Words_prime %in% quxiang, "趋向动补", "结果动补"),
                词类 = factor(词类, levels = c("趋向动补", "结果动补")),
                Syntax_production = ifelse(is.na(Syntax_production), "错误", as.character(Syntax_production)),
                Syntax_production = factor(Syntax_production, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be", "错误")),
                Group = factor(Group, levels = c("TDC", "ASD")),
                Syntax_prime = factor(Syntax_prime, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")))
df02 <- merge(df02, pingfen, by = "Rate_ID")

dfqx2 <- df02 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Syntax_ACC, 词类) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 == "趋向动补", Syntax_prime == "be") |>
  count(Syntax_production, Group) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>
  column_to_rownames("Syntax_production") |>
  as.matrix()
dfjg2 <- df02 |>
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Group, Syntax_prime, Syntax_production, Syntax_ACC, 词类) |>
  dplyr::filter(词类 != "趋向动补", Syntax_prime == "zh") |>
  count(Syntax_production, Group) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>
  column_to_rownames("Syntax_production") |>
  as.matrix()
dfqx2; dfjg2
qxbf <- contingencyTableBF(dfqx2, sampleType = "poisson" )
jgbf <- contingencyTableBF(dfjg2, sampleType = "poisson" )
```


```{r}
DFba <- DF2 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Syntax_prime == "ba" & Syntax_ACC == 0)%>%
  group_by(Syntax_production)%>%
  summarise(count = n())

DFzh <- DF2 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Syntax_prime == "zh" & Syntax_ACC == 0)%>%
  group_by(Syntax_production)%>%
  summarise(count = n())

#语义错误的启动分类,卡方显示并不存在某种句法下诱导不出来
DF3 <- df %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!Child_name %in% DF1)%>%
  merge(basic, by = "Child_name") %>%
  dplyr::select(-contains(".x"), -contains(".y"), -Task_Data, -Birth_data) %>%
  dplyr::select(Child_name, Sex, Age, everything())%>%
  dplyr::mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = c("ASD", "TDC")),
                Syntax_prime = factor(Syntax_prime, levels = c("zh", "ba", "be")),
                age = scale(Age, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE))%>%
  dplyr::filter(Group == "ASD")%>%
  filter(Sen_ACC == 0) %>% 
  group_by(Syntax_prime) %>% 
  summarise(n =n())
predice.value = c(1/3, 1/3, 1/3)
chisq.test(x = DF3$n, p = predice.value)
```



```{r 贝叶斯1406模型建立和比较正确产出}
names(df01)
a01.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_ACC ~ Syntax_prime * Group + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = df01,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

a02.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_ACC ~ Syntax_prime * Group + 词类 + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = df01,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

a03.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_ACC ~ Syntax_prime * Group * 词类 + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = df01,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

a04.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_ACC ~ Syntax_prime * Group + PPVTZ + 词类 + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = df01,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

a05.bayes <- brm(
  Syntax_ACC ~ Syntax_prime * Group * 词类 + PPVTZ + (1| Child_name) + (1 | Trials),
  data = df01,
  init = 0,
  family = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  warmup = 1000,
  iter = 5000,
  thin = 1,
  cores = 4)

looa01 <- LOO(a01.bayes)
looa02 <- LOO(a02.bayes)
looa03 <- LOO(a03.bayes)
looa04 <- LOO(a04.bayes)
looa05 <- LOO(a05.bayes)
brms::loo_compare(looa01, looa02, looa03, looa04, looa05)

a01.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(a01.bayes)
a02.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(a02.bayes)
a03.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(a03.bayes)
a04.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(a04.bayes)
a05.pp.mae <- posterior_predict(a05.bayes)
a01.mae <- median(abs(apply(a01.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df01[, 16]))
a02.mae <- median(abs(apply(a02.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df01[, 16]))
a03.mae <- median(abs(apply(a03.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df01[, 16]))
a04.mae <- median(abs(apply(a04.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df01[, 16]))
a05.mae <- median(abs(apply(a05.pp.mae, 2, mean) - df01[, 16]))
```

```{r 贝叶斯1406模型拟合正确产出}
a05_trace <- bayesplot::mcmc_trace(a05.bayes,
                                   pars = c("b_Syntax_primeba",
                                            "b_Syntax_primebe",
                                            "b_GroupASD",
                                            "b_词类结果动补",
                                            "b_PPVTZ",
                                            "b_Syntax_primeba:GroupASD",
                                            "b_Syntax_primebe:GroupASD",
                                            "b_Syntax_primeba:词类结果动补",
                                            "b_Syntax_primebe:词类结果动补",
                                            "b_GroupASD:词类结果动补",
                                            "b_Syntax_primeba:GroupASD:词类结果动补",
                                            "b_Syntax_primebe:GroupASD:词类结果动补"
                                            )) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1, "pt"),
        legend.key.size = unit(1, "lines"),
        legend.key.height = unit(1, "lines")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 0.5)))
a05_trace
#ggsave(plot = trace_noeff, "./figure/trace_noeff.svg", width = 6, height = 4)

a05.ppcheck <- pp_check(a05.bayes, ndraws = 100)
a05.ppcheck 
a05.b <- mcmc_plot(a05.bayes, 
                   variable = c("b_Syntax_primeba",
                                "b_Syntax_primebe",
                                "b_GroupASD",
                                "b_Syntax_primeba:GroupASD",
                                "b_Syntax_primebe:GroupASD"),
                   type = "areas", prob = 0.95)
a05.b
a05.pos <- posterior_predict(a05.bayes)
a05.hdi <- bayestestR::hdi(a05.bayes)
df01$predict = predict(a05.bayes, type = "response")[, 1]
```
